def eligible_for_migraine_management(self) -> bool:
        if (self.chronic_migraines == 'yes' and 
            (18 < self.age < 60) and 
            (self.race not in ['asian', 'indian']) and 
            (self.employment_status in ['employed', 'retired']) and 
            (self.education in ['bachelor', 'master', 'doctor']) and 
            (self.marital_status in ['single', 'married']) and 
            (self.religion in ['christianity', 'islam']) ):
            return True
        else:
            return False
